account.label: Habitica Account
account.description: Create or copy credentials from Habitica Settings > API.

apiToken.label: API Token
apiToken.description: Habitica x-api-key header. The token is saved in Noctalia plugin settings.

basicUi.label: Basic UI
basicUi.description: The default panel stays focused on today's dailies and open todos.

notificationBadge.label: Show notification badge
notificationBadge.description: Badge shows pending due dailies plus open todos.

advancedUi.label: Advanced UI
advancedUi.description: Optional features are disabled by default to keep the panel minimal.

showHabits.label: Show habits
showHabits.description: Adds a Habits section with up/down scoring.

checklist.label: Show checklist items
checklist.description: Shows daily/todo checklists and lets you toggle checklist progress.

tagFilter.label: Enable tag filtering
tagFilter.description: Fetch tags and filter tasks by a selected tag ID.

selectedTag.label: Selected Tag ID
selectedTag.description: Paste a Habitica tag UUID. Leave empty to show all tasks.

colorization.label: Enable colorization
colorization.description: Apply theme colors to the bar icon and badge.

ipc.title: IPC
ipc.refresh: Refresh: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:habitica refresh

panel.credentialsDescription: Add your Habitica User ID and API Token in this plugin's settings.

toast.configure: Configure Habitica credentials in plugin settings

tooltip.configure:
Habitica
Configure User ID and API Token

error.configure: Configure your Habitica User ID and API Token in settings.
error.network: Habitica request failed. Check your network connection.
